---
title: "Ioan Scheffel"
---

::: {.columns .v-center-container}
::: {.column width="65%"}
I am a PhD candidate in mathematics at the [University of Stuttgart](https://www.uni-stuttgart.de/), supervised by [Marco Oesting](https://www.isa.uni-stuttgart.de/institut/team/Oesting/). My research lies in probability theory, with a focus on stochastic processes, extreme value theory, and time series.

I am currently finishing my PhD and looking for postdoctoral positions.

**Research interests:** extreme value theory, stochastic processes, time series, asymptotic statistics.

## Contact

Email: [scheffin@tutamail.com](mailto:scheffin@tutamail.com)
Affiliation: University of Stuttgart
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
![](photo_relaxed.png){.profile-photo}
:::
:::
